sql_array: UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = toStartOfWeek(event_time) WHERE event_time < toDateTime('2023-05-01 00:00:00');
SELECT toStartOfWeek(event_time) AS start_of_week FROM test_dates FORMAT Vertical;
SELECT toStartOfWeek(toDateTime('2023-06-15 14:30:45'), 1) AS start_of_week_monday FORMAT Vertical;
